Return JSON only.
Only include items whose tones are incorrect or uncertain.
If all current tone variants are correct, omit the item.

      "current_tones_variants": string[][],
      "status": "corrected" | "uncertain",
      "corrected_tones": string[],
      "reason": string
    }
  ]
}
